entries.name: Emberpup
entries.description: The lively creatures like to follow Flameruffs around. Once the smoldering fur starts to burn, they thrive.

skills.name: Fire Kick
skills.description: Jumps up to dodge an attack, allowing flames to encircle itself before delivering a dive-kick, dealing damage to all targets near the kick. A successful dodge will also deal 120% damage and increase damage by 20% for 20s.

skills.name: Pebble Kick
skills.description: Jumps up to dodge an attack, allowing broken stones to encircle itself before delivering a dive-kick, dealing damage to all targets near the kick. A successful dodge will also deal 120% damage and increase damage by 20% for 20s.

skills.name: Fire Bolt
skills.description: Launches a fireball at the target and applies 2 stacks of Fire Debuff for 5s. Hold the skill button to aim.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields the power of fire to attack targets at close range.

traits.name: Scorching Flames
traits.description: Increases damage dealt to enemies weak to your element by 15%.

mobility_skills.description: Enters Hustle state, increasing movement speed by consuming stamina.

entries.name: Inferlupa
entries.description: A Flameruff who challenged the strong and lost, absorbing the souls of companions who fell with equal bitterness. It is driven by the desire for revenge.

skills.name: Unbroken Flameruff Spirit
skills.description: Fires a Flameruff Spirit that ricochets between targets, increasing BREAK efficiency against them by 10% per stack, up to 3 stacks, for 20s. Ricochets 5 times by default. While in the [Full Energy] state, ricochets 7 times.

upgrade.name: Unbroken Flameruff Spirit
upgrade.description: Fires a Flameruff Spirit that ricochets between targets, prioritizing the locked-on target at the time of launch. Increases BREAK efficiency for targets hit by % per stack, up to 3 stacks, lasting 20 s. Base ricochets: 6 times. Ricochets 8 times while in Full Energy state.

skills.name: Hunting Pack
skills.description: Summons 2 clones to attack the selected location. Summons 1 extra clone while in the [Full Energy] state.

skills.name: Crossfire
skills.description: Fires a flame ray that penetrates targets and deals up to 9 hits of damage. While [Full Energy] is active, Might increases by 45% .

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: (BREAK) Wields the power of darkness to attack targets at close range.

ultimates.name: Wolfpack Onslaught
ultimates.description: Summons a soul clone to perform a forward Tackle. Upon hitting a target, it explodes, dealing damage.

traits.name: Full Energy
traits.description: After using 8 basic attacks in battle, Inferlupa enters Full Energy, enhancing its next skill. Damage dealt by that skill is treated as basic attack damage.

mobility_skills.name: Hustle
mobility_skills.description: Enters Hustle state, increasing movement speed by consuming stamina.

homeland.description: Aniimo with the Hauling ability can pick up stockpiled produce from facilities and carry it to the Home storage.

homeland.name: Fire
homeland.description: Fire-type Aniimo specialize in cooking and supplying heat.

homeland.name: Dark
homeland.description: Dark-type Aniimo specialize in harvesting crops, cutting down plants, and drying items.

entries.name: Celestis
entries.description: They love food! When they search the forest for food, the glowing stars on their heads are often mistaken for comets. They like hoarding food, adorning their nest with it.

skills.name: Shooting Star Bombs
skills.description: Shoots stars to attack a target, dealing damage.

skills.name: Star Glide
skills.description: Flies overhead, dropping stars that damage targets. Hitting the same target 3 times increases this Aniimo's EP recovery rate by 10% for 10s.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields dark power to attack targets from a distance.

traits.name: Grand Sorcerer
traits.description: For 5s after using a skill, basic attack hits deal additional damage equal to 5 Might.

homeland.name: Leisure
homeland.description: Playful Aniimo happily produce various items while they play and have fun.

homeland.name: Dark
homeland.description: Dark-type Aniimo specialize in harvesting crops, cutting down plants, and drying items.

to.name: Stellarys
requirements: Defeat Alpha Stellarys
Must reach required aniimo level: Aniimo level 18

entries.name: Stellarys
entries.description: They prefer solitude and often move through the night. With their starry, cloak-like forms, they resemble mysterious mages and can teleport using psychic energy.

skills.name: Shadow Magic
skills.description: Immediately breaks free of control effects and retreats from the target, leaving a clone behind for 20s. The clone cannot be attacked and mimics the user's basic attacks and skills, dealing damage equal to 20% of the user's damage. Use the skill again to swap places with the clone. The clone is destroyed if it moves more than 20m away from the user.

skills.name: Chill Glide
skills.description: Flies overhead, dropping Ice stars that damage targets. Hitting the same target 3 times increases this Aniimo's EP recovery rate by 10% for 10s. After using the skill for 4s, it can attack while moving.

skills.name: Shooting Star Glide
skills.description: Flies overhead, dropping stars that damage targets. Hitting the same target 3 times increases this Aniimo's EP recovery rate by 10% for 10s. After using the skill for 4s, it can attack while moving.

skills.name: Shooting Stars
skills.description: Fires 3 homing stars. Each time a star damages a target, the user gains a 1% Damage Boost, stacking up to 15 times.

upgrade.name: Shooting Stars
upgrade.description: Fires 5 homing stars. Each time a star damages a target, the user gains a % Damage Boost, stacking up to 20 times.

skills.name: Aquatic Glide
skills.description: Flies overhead, dropping Water stars that damage targets. Hitting the same target 3 times increases this Aniimo's EP recovery rate by 10% for 10s. After using the skill for 4s, it can attack while moving.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields dark power to attack targets from a distance.

ultimates.name: Comet Aureus
ultimates.description: Summons a large number of comets from the sky to attack a target, dealing a huge amount of damage.

traits.name: Grand Sorcerer
traits.description: For 5s after using a skill, basic attack hits deal additional damage equal to 5 Might.

homeland.name: Leisure
homeland.description: Playful Aniimo happily produce various items while they play and have fun.

homeland.name: Dark
homeland.description: Dark-type Aniimo specialize in harvesting crops, cutting down plants, and drying items.

entries.name: Stellarys
entries.description: Stellaryses born in the rainy season are found more often on rainy days, as their thin skin requires constant moisture.

skills.description: Immediately breaks free of control effects and retreats from the target, leaving a clone behind for 20s. The clone cannot be attacked and mimics the user's basic attacks and skills, dealing damage equal to 20% of the user's damage. Use the skill again to swap places with the clone. The clone is destroyed if it moves more than 20m away from the user.

skills.name: Chill Glide
skills.description: Flies overhead, dropping Ice stars that damage targets. Hitting the same target 3 times increases this Aniimo's EP recovery rate by 10% for 10s. After using the skill for 4s, it can attack while moving.

skills.name: Shooting Star Glide
skills.description: Flies overhead, dropping stars that damage targets. Hitting the same target 3 times increases this Aniimo's EP recovery rate by 10% for 10s. After using the skill for 4s, it can attack while moving.

skills.name: Shooting Stars
skills.description: Fires 3 homing stars. Each time a star damages a target, the user gains a 1% Damage Boost, stacking up to 15 times.

upgrade.name: Shooting Stars
upgrade.description: Fires 5 homing stars. Each time a star damages a target, the user gains a % Damage Boost, stacking up to 20 times.

skills.name: Aquatic Glide
skills.description: Flies overhead, dropping Water stars that damage targets. Hitting the same target 3 times increases this Aniimo's EP recovery rate by 10% for 10s. After using the skill for 4s, it can attack while moving.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields dark power to attack targets from a distance.

ultimates.name: Comet Aureus
ultimates.description: Summons a large number of comets from the sky to attack a target, dealing a huge amount of damage.

traits.name: Grand Sorcerer
traits.description: For 5s after using a skill, basic attack hits deal additional damage equal to 5 Might.

upgrade.name: Gale Guard
upgrade.description: Assumes a defensive stance and gains % Damage Reduction. When the defensive stance ends, gains a shield equal to % max HP for s. Tap the skill again to end it early. While in the defensive stance, each hit taken increases the shield gained by 10% , up to 100% . When the shield expires, converts % of the remaining shield into healing.

entries.name: Irisalis
entries.description: They absorb the world's colors as floral raiment, bringing colorful vitality to nature. If petals wither, they can bloom again by returning to the earth's embrace.

skills.name: Whirling Blossom Rain
skills.description: Spins and dashes in the chosen direction, firing multiple homing bolts in succession. Also activates all Iris doubles to fire floral light beams.

skills.name: Irisalis Shadow
skills.description: After Iris Shot hits a target, summons 1 Iris Clone for 30 s. The clone immediately fires a Floral Gleam Beam at the target. Casting the skill again resets the clones.

upgrade.name: Irisalis Shadow
upgrade.description: After Iris Shot hits a target, summons 1 Iris Clone. The clone immediately fires a Floral Gleam Beam at the target and summons 1 additional clone. All clones last 30 s. Casting the skill again resets the clones.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields the power of grass to attack targets from a distance.

ultimates.name: Florae Descent
ultimates.description: Condenses energy into a massive phantom that dives down and slams into the ground, dealing area damage and leaving 1 Irisalis clone that lasts 30 s. This clone can coexist with the clone summoned by Irisalis Shadow . Recasting the Ultimate resets the clone.

traits.name: Bloom Cluster
traits.description: Each time an Irisalis clone hits a target, gains 1 Dance Power. At 9 Dance Power, the next skill costs 50% less EP and restores HP to nearby allies equal to 8% of own max HP. When Fainted, Irisalis turns into a flower and blooms again, restoring vitality. Triggers once every 180s.

spawn_requirements: May appear northwest of the frozen lake in Driftwise Meadow during Prismana Flow . Only one can appear at a time, and it will not respawn.
Only one can appear at a time and it does not respawn.

entries.name: Leafy
entries.description: They live among lotus flowers and use their lotus leaf tails to conceal their face and show off their elegant nature.

skills.name: Blooms of Vigor
skills.description: Creates a circular magic field underfoot, restoring 1 EP every second to Grass-type teammates within range for 12s. The field also upgrades nearby grass into Vitality Blooms, restoring 1% HP every second to Grass-type teammates within range.

upgrade.name: Blooms of Vigor
upgrade.description: Creates a circular magic circle underfoot, restoring Energy and Ultimate Energy per second to Grass teammates within range for s. After leaving the area, the magic circle’s effect remains for 3 s. The magic circle also upgrades grass within range into Vitality Blooms, restoring % HP per second to Grass-type teammates within range.

skills.name: Cyclone of Leaves
skills.description: Attacks with its tail and releases a cyclone of leaves that moves forward. The cyclone generates grassland around the Aniimo, lasting for 20 s.

skills.name: Vine Entanglement
skills.description: Launches a circular magical strike around a target. If the affected target is on grassland, it will also be entangled by vines for 3s.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields the power of grass to attack targets from a distance.

ultimates.name: Lotus Bloom
ultimates.description: Quickly forms a lotus cocoon that bursts open, instantly healing the whole team for 15% of the caster’s max HP, and grants the entire team 15% Grass Enhancement for 30s.

traits.name: Power of Nature
traits.description: While off field, creates a patch of grass under a teammate after they cast 3 skills.

homeland.name: Water
homeland.description: Water-type Aniimo specialize in brewing and watering plants.

homeland.name: Grass
homeland.description: Grass-type Aniimo specialize in planting seeds and gathering resources.

homeland.description: Aniimo with the Hauling ability can pick up stockpiled produce from facilities and carry it to the Home storage.

entries.name: Nimbi
entries.description: Don't be surprised to see them floating in the clouds in small groups above the grasslands.

skills.name: Cloud Orb
skills.description: Throws a missile condensed from clouds at the target. If the user is [Shrouded in Mist], the missile creates a larger explosion on hit, dealing damage equal to 250% Might.

skills.name: Thunder Bolt
skills.description: Throws a missile condensed from thunderclouds at the target. If the user is [Shrouded in Mist], the missile creates a larger explosion on hit, dealing damage equal to 250% Might.

skills.name: Cloud Shield
skills.description: Creates a cloud shield to protect itself, absorbing damage up to15% max HP and reducing stamina consumption by15% for 20s. While affected by [Shrouded in Mist], the shield absorbs damage up to 18% max HP instead, and stamina consumption is reduced by 18% for 30s.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields the power of wind to attack targets from a distance.

traits.name: Shrouded in Mist
traits.description: After using 6 basic attacks, enters [Shrouded in Mist] state. Casting a skill consumes this state to enhance the skill's effects.

mobility_skills.name: Puff Up
mobility_skills.description: Puffs up, allowing you to jump higher and perform one dash while airborne.

homeland.name: Leisure
homeland.description: Playful Aniimo happily produce various items while they play and have fun.

homeland.name: Wind
homeland.description: Wind-type Aniimo specialize in controlling the wind to process products.

entries.name: Turbo
entries.description: They like to sleep hidden in the clouds, because with the presence of wind pressure and static electricity, the fluffy wool easily attracts things that drift by on the wind.

skills.name: Nimbi Burst
skills.description: Inhales, then slams the ground, triggering an explosion that deals AoE damage in a circular area around itself. Increases teammates' damage and BREAK efficiency by 6% for 15s. If the user is [Shrouded in Mist], the damage and BREAK efficiency boost also applies to all nearby allies, with the boost increased to 11%.

upgrade.name: Nimbi Burst
upgrade.description: Inhales, then slams the ground, triggering an explosion that deals AoE damage in a circular area around itself. Increases teammates' damage and BREAK efficiency by for s. If the user is [Shrouded in Mist] , that effect is retained, and the damage and BREAK efficiency boost also applies to all nearby allies, with the boost increased to .

skills.name: Nebula Burst
skills.description: Inhales, then slams the ground, triggering an explosion that deals AoE damage in a circular area around itself. Increases teammates' Dark damage by 6%% for 15s. If the user is [Shrouded in Mist], the Dark damage boost also applies to all nearby allies, with the boost increased to 11%%.

If the user is [Shrouded in Mist], the Dark damage boost also applies to all nearby allies, with the boost increased to 11%%.

skills.name: Cloud Orb
skills.description: Throws a missile condensed from clouds at the target. If the user is [Shrouded in Mist], the missile creates a larger explosion on hit, dealing damage equal to 250% Might.

skills.name: Thunder Bolt
skills.description: Throws a missile condensed from thunderclouds at the target. If the user is [Shrouded in Mist], the missile creates a larger explosion on hit, dealing damage equal to 250% Might.

skills.name: Cloud Shield
skills.description: Creates a cloud shield to protect itself, absorbing damage up to15% max HP and reducing stamina consumption by15% for 20s. While affected by [Shrouded in Mist], the shield absorbs damage up to 18% max HP instead, and stamina consumption is reduced by 18% for 30s.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields the power of wind to attack targets from a distance.

ultimates.name: Collectible Drop
ultimates.description: Turbo sneezes, shaking 7 collectibles out of its wool. Picking up a collectible restores 7% HP.

traits.name: Shrouded in Mist
traits.description: After using 6 basic attacks, enters [Shrouded in Mist] state. Casting a skill consumes this state to enhance the skill's effects.

mobility_skills.name: Cloudwalk
mobility_skills.description: Floats freely among the clouds.

entries.name: Dreaple
entries.description: Their fur that has absorbed dream energy presents a mesmerizing illusion of colors. When they use this fur as a pillow to sleep, they sink into sweet dreams.

skills.name: Nimbi Attack
skills.description: Summons a Nimbi that charges toward the caster, damaging targets in its path and applying 1 stack of [Drowsiness]. Use again to send the Nimbi charging back toward the target.

upgrade.name: Nimbi Attack
upgrade.description: Summons a Nimbi that follows the caster, damaging targets in its path and applying 1 stack of > [Drowsiness] . Use again to make the Nimbi chase the target instead.

skills.name: Nightmare Devourer
skills.description: Restores 5% HP to this Aniimo and nearby allies, then absorbs [Nightmare] from nearby targets. Each absorbed [Nightmare] status increases healing by 2%, up to 3 stacks.

skills.name: Hypnotic Cloud Shot
skills.description: Fires a Hypnotic Cloud Shot at the target. After it explodes, it deals damage to targets in the area and applies 1 stack of Drowsiness.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields dark power to attack targets from a distance.

ultimates.name: Dream Blast
ultimates.description: Deals damage to targets in range and applies 2 stacks of [Drowsiness]. Increases the whole team’s Dark damage by 12% for 30s.

traits.name: Counting Sheep
traits.description: Every 10s, the next skill applies 1 stack of [Drowsiness] to the target. At 3 stacks, the target enters [Nightmare] for 20s. Targets in [Nightmare] have their Dark Resistance reduced by 17% and cannot move or cast skills for 3s. Taking damage removes the control effect.

homeland.name: Dark
homeland.description: Dark-type Aniimo specialize in harvesting crops, cutting down plants, and drying items.

spawn_requirements: 1 Dreaple appears for every 30 Emberpup-family Aniimo caught (this does not stack).

entries.name: Hummin
entries.description: They live on the grassland in groups, they like burrowing for nutrients, and they love singing off-key together!

skills.name: Gravel Tackle
skills.description: Ram into the target with your body, dealing Earth damage.

skills.name: Euphoric Sonic Blast
skills.description: Lets out a special scream, dealing damage to enemies in a frontal cone and restoring 10 energy.

skills.name: Plant Charge
skills.description: Rams into the target with the body.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: (BREAK) Wields the power of grass to attack targets at close range.

traits.name: Energized
traits.description: For every 1,000 max HP, increases BREAK damage by 2%.

homeland.name: Grass
homeland.description: Grass-type Aniimo specialize in planting seeds and gathering resources.

homeland.name: Artisanship
homeland.description: Crafty Aniimo create furniture, appearance items, and other goods for your Home.

entries.name: Witchin
entries.description: They make bizarre noises to drive intruders to madness, lower their defenses and even cause them to pass out.

skills.name: Malice Burst
skills.description: Releases a large energy shock wave around the target, dealing damage to enemies hit and reducing their healing received by 50% for 10s.

skills.name: Euphoric Sonic Blast
skills.description: Lets out a special scream, dealing damage to enemies in a frontal cone and restoring 10 energy.

upgrade.name: Euphoric Sonic Blast
upgrade.description: Lets out a special scream, dealing damage to enemies in a frontal cone and restoring 15 energy.

skills.name: Shard Impact
skills.description: Quickly step back while summoning an Earthen sigil beneath the target—shrapnel continuously launches from the sigil to strike them.

skills.name: Black Hole Domain
skills.description: Quickly backstep a short distance while leaving a black hole beneath the target that continuously pulls them in and deals damage.

skills.name: Oozing Malice
skills.description: Releases an energy shock wave around the target, dealing damage to enemies hit and reducing their healing received by 50% for 10s.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields dark power to attack targets from a distance.

ultimates.name: Annihilation Bomb
ultimates.description: Gathers annihilation energy in the palm and hurls it toward the target, dealing massive AoE damage.

traits.name: Prank
traits.description: Every 18s, the next skill applies [Curse] to enemies hit for 10s. Dark basic attacks restore 0.25 EP when hitting enemies with [Curse].

entries.name: Tuckin
entries.description: They need to absorb nutrients from the soil through their roots to maintain vitality and hate leaving the ground.

skills.name: Nutrient Absorption
skills.description: Roots itself firmly in the soil, gaining 20% Damage Reduction and 2% continuous healing per second.Instantly restores 50% HP to all Hummin, and increases nearby Hummin's damage by 20% and BREAK efficiency by 20%.

upgrade.name: Nutrient Absorption
upgrade.description: Roots firmly into the soil, gaining % damage reduction. This Aniimo and nearby Hummins continuously recover % HP per second. Instantly restores HP for all Hummins by 50% , and increases damage by % , BREAK efficiency by % , and damage reduction by % for nearby Hummins.

skills.name: Haunting Choir
skills.description: All Hummin units teleport next to targets and release sonic attacks, dealing AoE damage and stunning targets for 1 s.

skills.name: Gravel Strike
skills.description: Teleports all Hummin units next to the target to unleash Gravel Tackle, dealing damage.

skills.name: Off-Key Shock Wave
skills.description: Teleports all Off-Key Grass units next to the target and unleashes a Tackle attack, dealing damage.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: (BREAK) Wields the power of grass to attack targets at close range.

ultimates.name: Breaking Roar
ultimates.description: Restores Hummin units to their maximum number, then roars with them to release a massive shockwave at the target.

traits.name: Prank Master
traits.description: Increases BREAK damage by % for every 21,000 max HP. Upon entering battle, summons 1 Hummin to assist. An additional Hummin is summoned every 10s, up to a maximum of 3.

entries.description: Mating for life, they're always found in pairs. The heartbloom atop their shells indicates their state of happiness.

traits.description: Skills build Momentum when they deal damage, up to 6 stacks. Momentum gain is doubled during tunneling. At max stacks, increases BREAK efficiency by 30% for 15s.

mobility_skills.description: Tunnels underground to become immune to all ranged attacks by continuously consuming stamina. Pound skills can launch the Aniimo into the air.

entries.name: Budclaw
entries.description: For Budclaws that live on the beach, wearing a coconut husk is a no-brainer, both for protection and camouflage.

skills.name: The Luminus Gust
skills.description: Spins Cores around itself, continuously dealing damage and applying Earth Debuff for 6s.

skills.name: Verdant Beam
skills.description: Fires an energy beam in the direction the camera is facing, continuously dealing damage to targets within range. Consecutive hits gradually increase its Might.

skills.name: Leaf Slash
skills.description: Spins leaves around itself, dealing damage for 6s.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: (BREAK) Wields the power of earth to attack targets at close range.

traits.name: Stealth
traits.description: Skills build Momentum when they deal damage, up to 6 stacks. Momentum gain is doubled during tunneling. At max stacks, increases BREAK efficiency by 30% for 15s.

mobility_skills.name: Tunnel
mobility_skills.description: Tunnels underground to become immune to all ranged attacks by continuously consuming stamina. Pound skills can launch the Aniimo into the air.

homeland.description: Aniimo with the Hauling ability can pick up stockpiled produce from facilities and carry it to the Home storage.

homeland.description: Earth-type Aniimo specialize in reclaiming land and mining resources.

entries.name: Shrubclaw
entries.description: The lush plants that cover their shells convert sunlight into nutrients, so they don't even need to eat on sunny days.

skills.name: The Luminus Gust
skills.description: Spins Cores around itself, continuously dealing damage and applying Earth Debuff for 6s.

skills.name: Charged Strike
skills.description: Raises its pincers to charge. When fully charged or used again, performs 2 quick swings, attacking and briefly stunning the target. Can consume 3 stacks of [Earth Debuff] to deal additional damage equal to 20% Might. The user can move while charging.

upgrade.name: Charged Strike
upgrade.description: Raises its pincers to charge, with charge time greatly reduced. When fully charged or used again, performs 2 quick swings, attacking and briefly stunning the target. Deals additional damage equal to 20% Might to targets with [Earth Debuff] . The user can move while charging.

entries.name: Geoclaw
entries.description: They live in caves, feed on minerals, and use their beautifully crystallized shells to lure prey.

skills.name: Ice Spikes
skills.description: Creates an ice spike ahead, attacking and freezing the target for1s. Can be used during tunneling. Afterward, dashes forward and emerges from underground.

skills.name: Icy Gravel Dance
skills.description: Summons an Ice Storm that continuously builds up [Ice Debuff] on targets. The Ice Storm keeps moving forward until it hits a wall or a target.

upgrade.name: Icy Gravel Dance
upgrade.description: Summons an Ice Storm that continuously builds up [Ice Debuff] on targets. The Ice Storm keeps moving forward until it hits a wall or a target. It also increases debuff buildup efficiency by 30% and expands the area by 30%.

skills.name: Frost Slam
skills.description: Gathers icy vapor in both pincers, then slams them down to deal AoE damage in front and create an ice wall for 5 s.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: (BREAK) Wields the power of ice to attack targets at close range.

ultimates.name: Freezing Claws
ultimates.description: Deals damage over a large area.

traits.name: Frostbite Sunder
traits.description: Basic attacks apply [Ice Debuff]. Deals 35% extra BREAK to targets with more than 5 stacks of [Ice Debuff].

mobility_skills.name: Tunnel
mobility_skills.description: Tunnels underground to become immune to all ranged attacks by continuously consuming stamina. Pound skills can launch the Aniimo into the air.

homeland.name: Ice
homeland.description: Ice-type Aniimo specialize in cooling your homeland environment.

homeland.name: Carry
homeland.description: Aniimo with the Hauling ability can pick up stockpiled produce from facilities and carry it to the Home storage.

entries.name: Sparki
entries.description: Though they look like fire, those flames are only flowing energy. They give off no heat at all—in fact, they absorb heat from their surroundings. Sometimes they use this to disguise themselves as campfires and play tricks on others.

skills.name: Trick Fire Ring
skills.description: Launches a fire ring that expands then contracts to attack the target. The farther the target is, the more damage it will take, up to 50% increased damage.

skills.name: Fire Orb
skills.description: Throws an explosive fireball at the target. Press and hold to aim.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields the power of fire to attack targets from a distance.

traits.name: Blazing Flames
traits.description: Always has 20 stacks of [Fire Debuff]. [Trick Fire Ring] applies 4 stacks of [Fire Debuff], while [Fire Orb] applies 3 stacks of [Fire Debuff].

homeland.name: Fire
homeland.description: Fire-type Aniimo specialize in cooking and supplying heat.

to.name: Flamerion
requirements: Must reach required aniimo level: Aniimo level 21

entries.name: Sparki

skills.name: Trick Fire Ring
skills.description: Launches a fire ring that expands then contracts to attack the target. The farther the target is, the more damage it will take, up to 50% increased damage.

skills.name: Phantom Barrage
skills.description: Slams all targets within range that are affected by [Fire Debuff] from a distance. Restores 2 EP for each stack of [Fire Debuff] on the target, up to 18 EP.

upgrade.name: Phantom Barrage
upgrade.description: Slam the target, immediately restoring 5 Energy. Perform a remote slam on all other targets within range affected by Fire Debuff . For each stack of Fire Debuff on a target, restore Energy, up to points.

skills.name: Fire Orb
skills.description: Throws an explosive fireball at the target. Press and hold to aim.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields the power of fire to attack targets from a distance.

ultimates.name: Phantom Flame Cannon
ultimates.description: Jumps up and throws a giant fireball at the target. It explodes on landing, dealing wide-area damage and applying 12 stacks of [Fire Debuff] .

traits.name: Blazing Flames
traits.description: Always has 20 stacks of [Fire Debuff]. [Trick Fire Ring] applies 4 stacks of [Fire Debuff], while [Fire Orb] applies 3 stacks of [Fire Debuff].

entries.name: Flutternym
entries.description: They are timid and hide whenever they sense danger, but the fluorescent scales they shake off always give them away.

skills.name: Purifying Dance
skills.description: Removes all debuffs on surrounding teammates. Once the debuffs are removed, increases their EP recovery rate by 20% for 10s.

skills.name: Healing Dance
skills.description: Creates a warm wind area beneath the feet, continuously healing the entire team for 9% of the caster’s Max HP over 8 s. Grass Aniimo receive an additional 3% healing.

skills.name: Phantom Dance
skills.description: Removes all debuffs for the caster. When not deployed in battle, Gracewing automatically emerges to remove debuffs from active teammates.

skills.name: Wind of Rejuvenation
skills.description: Creates a warm wind area beneath the feet, continuously healing the entire team for 9% of the caster’s Max HP over 8 s. Wind Aniimo receive an additional 3% healing.

skills.name: Wind of Regeneration
skills.description: Creates a warm wind area beneath the feet, continuously healing the entire team for 9% of the caster’s Max HP over 8 s. Earth Aniimo receive an additional 3% healing.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields the power of wind to attack targets from a distance.

traits.name: Flutter Heal
traits.description: When entering battle as the active Aniimo, increases healing by 20%. If off field, appears as a phantom. When other Aniimo cast skills or Ultimates, restores HP equal to 0.5% of max HP.

homeland.name: Leisure
homeland.description: Playful Aniimo happily produce various items while they play and have fun.

homeland.name: Wind
homeland.description: Wind-type Aniimo specialize in controlling the wind to process products.

skills.name: Hypnotic Spores
skills.description: On hit, inflicts [Hypnosis] on the target, increasing their damage taken by 25% and preventing them from acting. Removed when the target takes damage. Lasts 5s. Does not affect Grass-type Aniimo.

skills.name: Energy Orb
skills.description: Charges and gathers Energy above the target, then drops it to strike the target. Hold the Skill button to charge. Every 0.6s, consumes 10 Energy to increase the skill damage, up to 4 times. Stages 1 to 5 deal damage equal to 1/2/3/4.5/6x Might, respectively.

skills.description: Grants Thorny Blessing to the whole team. When dealing Grass critical damage to a target, creates thorns beneath it that deal damage. Triggers up to 1 time every 0.5s for 14s.

upgrade.name: Thorny Blessing
upgrade.description: Grants Thorny Blessing to the whole team. When the team deals Grass critical damage to a target, thorns appear under the target and deal damage. Triggers up to once every s for s.

skills.name: Healing Rose
skills.description: Summons a rose that explodes and applies Rose Mark to the target. Rose Mark blooms after the target takes 3 critical hits, healing all nearby allies for 5% of Melloblum's HP.

skills.name: Blasting Roses
skills.description: Releases petals that track and attack the target. This skill gains 35% extra critical rate.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields the power of grass to attack targets from a distance.

ultimates.name: Rose Garden
ultimates.description: Creates a magic circle beneath itself. Allies within range gain 70% increased Grass critical damage for 30s.

traits.name: Phantom Opening
traits.description: When a teammate deals basic attack damage, gains 1 stack of [Rose Mark], up to 10 stacks. Each stack of [Rose Mark] reduces Melloblum's EP cost by 3.

homeland.name: Grass
homeland.description: Grass-type Aniimo specialize in planting seeds and gathering resources.

homeland.name: Artisanship
homeland.description: Crafty Aniimo create furniture, appearance items, and other goods for your Home.

spawn_requirements: In the Maze of Thorns, after learning the secret of Melloblum’s Dance of Blissful Bloom.
Respawns after progressing the quest [Flowers and Thorns - Rosetower Wood].

entries.name: Pomegg
entries.description: They retreat into their shells to rest, often getting mistaken for eggs. They fear battle but love a crowd, dancing with grass balls to cheer others on.

skills.description: Strikes targets around itself and applies [Silence] to targets hit for 1.5s. While [Silence] is active, targets cannot use skills.

skills.name: Jittering Beats
skills.description: Strikes targets around itself and applies [Silence] to targets hit for 1.5s. While [Silence] is active, targets cannot use skills.

skills.name: Rhythm Combo
skills.description: Performs a rhythmic combo on the target. Can be used up to 3 times in a row. Casting with the right timing adds 1 extra stack of [Volume] .

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: (BREAK) Wields the power of grass to attack targets at close range.

traits.name: Tuning
traits.description: Each skill cast grants 1 stack of [Volume], up to 6 stacks. At 6 stacks of [Volume], increases critical rate by 15% for 15s.

entries.name: Dazmand
entries.description: They have flexible limbs and love to show off their flashy kicks to anyone watching. They wear their shed skin over their heads like a cool hood.

skills.name: Lightning Break
skills.description: Attacks the targets while break dancing.

skills.name: Thunder Sweep
skills.description: Rapidly spins into a sweeping kick, dealing AoE damage and pulling nearby targets in front of the user. On hit, increases the team's Lightning critical rate by 12% for 20s.

upgrade.name: Thunder Sweep
upgrade.description: Rapidly spins into a sweeping kick, dealing AoE damage, increasing the damage area by 50% , and pulling nearby targets in front of this Aniimo. On hit, increases the team’s Lightning CRIT rate by for s.

skills.name: Electricity Shock
skills.description: Curls into a ball and dashes at the target, dealing damage and applying 5 stacks of [Lightning Debuff]. If the target has more than 5 stacks of [Lightning Debuff] after being hit, applies [Paralysis] for 3s.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields the power of lightning to attack targets at close range.

ultimates.name: Lightning Storm
ultimates.description: Spins upside down on its head at high speed, creating a massive lightning storm. During the skill, deals 12 hits of damage to targets in range, and each hit applies 1 stack of [Lightning Debuff] . The user can move while casting.

traits.name: Spotlight Moment
traits.description: The first skill this Aniimo uses within 5s of entering battle does not consume EP. Cooldown: 17s.

homeland.description: Lightning-type Aniimo specialize in manipulating electricity.

entries.description: Their towering manes display their wild nature, while their feral roars reveal their true colors. Their tails are built to store sound waves, releasing a sonic boom when they strike an opponent.

skills.name: Wild Show
skills.description: Hold to charge the microphone, then release to unleash a massive sound wave, damaging targets in front. A well-timed release deals an additional 30% BREAK damage.

upgrade.name: Wild Show
upgrade.description: Hold to charge the microphone, then release to unleash a massive sound wave, damaging targets in front and applying [Stun] for s. A well-timed release deals an additional 30% % BREAK damage, and the perfect release window opens earlier.

entries.description: As partners to perfumers, they store and ferment nectar within their bodies, transforming it into perfume ingredients.

skills.name: Blossoming Moment
skills.description: Jumps up to dodge an attack, allowing a scent to encircle itself before dive-pecking the targets to deal damage. A successful dodge will generate a shield equal to 10% of max HP for 20s.

skills.name: Withering Bloom
skills.description: Releases a fragrance, dealing damage to targets within range and restoring HP to all team members equal to 6% of its own max HP. If there is only one target in range, the healing amount is doubled.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields dark power to attack targets at close range.

homeland.description: Dark-type Aniimo specialize in harvesting crops, cutting down plants, and drying items.

homeland.description: Playful Aniimo happily produce various items while they play and have fun.

entries.name: Fragrancier
entries.description: They're picky about odors, so they harvest and store various nectar within them to craft unique perfume ingredients.

skills.name: Withering Bloom
skills.description: Releases a fragrance, dealing damage to targets in range and restoring HP to all team members equal to 4% of its own max HP. If there is only one target in range, the healing amount is doubled.

skills.name: Blossoming Moment
skills.description: Jumps up to dodge an attack, allowing a scent to encircle itself before dive-pecking the targets to deal damage. A successful dodge will generate a shield equal to 10% of max HP for 20s.

skills.name: Fragrance Marking
skills.description: Deals damage to the targets in front while marking them with Secret Fragrance for 15s. While the marks are active, Dark-type basic attacks deal 25% extra damage to the targets.

upgrade.name: Fragrance Marking
upgrade.description: Deals damage to targets in front and applies [Secret Fragrance] for s. While the mark is active, Dark basic attacks deal % bonus damage to the target and have a 25% chance to deal an additional hit equal to the Might of Fragrancier's basic attack. Trigger interval: 0.5 s.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields dark power to attack targets at close range.

ultimates.name: Fragrance Bomb
ultimates.description: Flaps its wings to release a fragrance, increasing Dark damage for all team members by 10% for 30s. Also charms targets within range, leaving them dizzy for a short duration.

traits.name: Dangerous Fragrance
traits.description: When a skill deals damage to a target, reduces the target's Dark Resistance by 7% for 20s.

spawn_requirements: Appears after Ignitis (Basic Form) defeats 6 Wisptis (Forest Form).

entries.name: Ignitis
entries.description: The prismana dyes their sickles crimson as their black figures hide in the night like assassins.

skills.name: Dark Soul
skills.description: Transports itself to a target and attacks. If the target has less than 50% HP left, for each 1% HP lost, increases the Aniimo's damage by 1% . Defeating a target with this skill grants a time-limited free recast.

upgrade.name: Dark Soul
upgrade.description: Teleports to the target and launches a wide-area assault. When the target's HP is below 70% , damage increases by 1% for every 1% HP the target has lost. If this skill defeats the target, it can be recast for a short time without consuming EP.

skills.name: Fire Dash
skills.description: Tackles the target with the power of fire, increasing basic attack damage by 40% for 10s after casting.

skills.name: Dark Dash
skills.description: Tackles the target with the power of shadows, increasing basic attack damage by 40% for 10s after casting.

skills.name: Scythe Dance
skills.description: Spins to slash, dealing Dark damage 3 times to all nearby targets. Each hit increases own damage by 8%, up to 32%, for 10s.

skills.name: Forest Whirl
skills.description: Spins to slash, dealing Grass damage 3 times to all nearby targets. Each hit increases own damage by 8%, up to 32%, for 10s.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields dark power to attack targets at close range.

ultimates.name: Dimension Rupture
ultimates.description: Cleaves through space, dealing heavy Physical damage.

traits.name: Battle Fervor
traits.description: Defeating a target grants 1 stack of Battlelust, increasing damage by 25% for 20s. Stacks up to 2 times.

mobility_skills.name: Cloak
mobility_skills.description: Enter Cloak state.

entries.name: Fulmintis
entries.description: Evolved from a Wisptis with broken forelimbs absorbing the power of lightning. The reshaped reverse blades are incredibly sharp and flash with dazzling electric light.

skills.name: Lightning Blade Storm
skills.description: After dashing to close in on the target, it continuously consumes Energy to perform consecutive slashes. When Energy is depleted or clicked again, it unleashes a Spinning Slash that deals 26 Might damage. For every 3 consecutive slashes accumulated by this skill, the final Spinning Slash deals 100% increased damage.

upgrade.name: Lightning Blade Storm
upgrade.description: After dashing to the target, it continuously consumes Energy to perform consecutive slashes, increasing slash frequency by 20% . When Energy is depleted or tapped again, unleashes a Spinning Slash that deals 26 Might damage. For every 3 consecutive slashes accumulated by the skill, the final Spinning Slash deals 100% increased damage.

skills.name: Lightning Blade Impact
skills.description: Hold to enter Aim Mode and fire two Electric Blade Shock Waves. Critical hits inflict Paralysis on the target for 1 seconds.

skills.name: Enhanced Lightning Blade
skills.description: Enhances the blade, increasing skill CRIT rate by 25% for 20s.

skills.name: Enhanced Light Blade
skills.description: Empowers the blade with Light, increasing skill CRIT rate by 25% for 20s.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: (BREAK) Wields the power of lightning to attack targets at close range.

ultimates.name: Thunder Lance
ultimates.description: Deals multiple hits to targets in a straight line. Targets hit will be paralyzed for 1.5 seconds.

traits.name: Electro Stash
traits.description: Restores 4 EP when a skill lands a critical hit.

mobility_skills.name: Cloak
mobility_skills.description: Enter Cloak state.

entries.name: Bonesky
entries.description: An energetic pup with a pair of big ears. The ice-bone bow tie on its chest is its favorite toy. It hates Emberpups that don’t respect personal space.

skills.name: Ice Strikes
skills.description: Lunges forward and spins to create a magic field that fires 3 ice blades for 3 hits, dealing damage and applying 5 stacks of [Ice Debuff] .

skills.name: Night Slash
skills.description: Lunges forward and spins to unleash 3 dark blades to deal damage.

skills.name: Boomerang Blade
skills.description: Throws an ice blade forward, dealing damage to targets in range and applying stacks of [Ice Debuff] . The ice blade continuously consumes energy while spinning, and pressing the Skill button again recalls it.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields the power of ice to attack targets at close range.

traits.name: Biting Wind
traits.description: When dealing damage to targets with more than 5 stacks of [Ice Debuff], increases critical rate of that damage by 15%.

mobility_skills.name: Hustle
mobility_skills.description: Enters Hustle state, increasing movement speed by consuming stamina.

skills.description: Channels the power of lightning, sending a pushing lightning claw mark forward that deals up to 3 hits to enemies. This skill gains 50% additional critical rate.

skills.name: Electrified Impact
skills.description: Dashes toward the target with electricity and cannot be blocked during the dash. Restores 5 EP when landing a critical hit.

upgrade.name: Electrified Impact
upgrade.description: Dashes toward the target while electrified and cannot be blocked during the dash. Critical hits restore 5 energy. When used while [Overcharged] , energy cost is reduced by an additional 3 points.

skills.name: Dark Claw
skills.description: Unleash consecutive Dark claw strikes on the target, dealing Damage.

skills.name: Lightning Claw
skills.description: Channels the power of lightning and strikes the target with a three-hit claw combo. This skill gains 50% additional critical rate.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields the power of lightning to attack targets at close range.

ultimates.name: Lightning Flash
ultimates.description: Leaps up at high speed, gathers electricity, then slams down onto the target and enters the [Overcharged] state.

traits.name: Power Sustain
traits.description: After skills land 6 critical hits, becomes [Overcharged], immediately gaining a shield equal to 5% HP. All skills cost 12 less EP, but UP cannot be gained. Lasts 6s.

mobility_skills.name: High Jump
mobility_skills.description: Allows you to perform a higher jump.

entries.name: Bouldus
entries.description: A round stone that had stayed with Baleetle day and night woke up from all that bumping. Tired of being controlled, it swallowed an insect and could finally move by its own will.

skills.name: Clay Ball
skills.description: Throws a clay ball in a straight line in the direction faced, dealing damage on hit and applying Crumble effect.

skills.name: Rock Tackle
skills.description: Charges briefly in place, then rushes at the target and slams into it, dealing damage and creating 4 [Rock Piles] around the target.

upgrade.name: Rock Tackle
upgrade.description: After charging in place for a short while, rushes at the target and slams into it with its body, dealing damage and stunning the target for seconds, then generates 4 Rock Piles around the target.

skills.name: Ice Sphere
skills.description: Transforms into a ball that moves forward automatically for 15s. Direction can be adjusted. Hitting an enemy deals damage, while bouncing off a wall deals AoE damage equal to 15 Might to nearby targets. Jump is available in the Rolling Ball state, dealing AoE damage equal to 20 Might on landing. Jump cooldown: 5s.

skills.name: Rolling Ball
skills.description: Transforms into a ball that moves forward automatically for 15s. Direction can be adjusted. Hitting an enemy deals damage, while bouncing off a wall deals AoE damage equal to 15 Might to nearby targets. Jump is available in the Rolling Ball state, dealing AoE damage equal to 20 Might on landing. Jump cooldown: 5s.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields the power of earth to attack targets at close range.

ultimates.name: Boulder Blast
ultimates.description: Spins rapidly across the ground, pulling in debris before detonating violently. On explosion, deals AoE damage and generates 6 [Rock Piles] around the Bouldus.

traits.name: Rock Empowerment
traits.description: [Rock Piles] created by Bouldus can be destroyed by Waleetle's [Stone Ball Drift], releasing shock waves and applying [Disintegration] to the target.[Disintegration]: Each stack reduces Earth Resistance by 3%% and Movement Speed by 5% for 20s. Stacks up to 6 times.

entries.name: Fentuft
entries.description: They always wear a signature smile and invite other aniimo to play. Though they sometimes cause trouble due to mischief and greed, they are always forgiven.

skills.name: Thunder Field
skills.description: Generates a thunder field that keeps following the target. Targets within the thunder field that receive a Lightning attack will be hit by an additional Lightning attack and be inflicted with a Lightning Debuff . The thunder field lasts for 8 s.

skills.name: Lightning Dart
skills.description: Launches a lightning dart at the target, dealing damage to all targets along the way while drawing them closer.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields the power of lightning to attack targets from a distance.

traits.name: Thunderbond
traits.description: When this Aniimo's attack hits a target, it gains 1 stack of [Thunderbond]. At 30 stacks, it enters the [Thunderwing Stance] when using its next skill or Ultimate. Lasts 10s.

mobility_skills.name: Scurry
mobility_skills.description: Rushes forward a short distance.

homeland.description: Lightning-type Aniimo specialize in manipulating electricity.

requirements: Watch Pathfinders swap Aniimo and strengthen their friendship: Swap an aniimo with a friend once
Must reach required aniimo level: Aniimo level 42

entries.name: Fenmane
entries.description: Using the excellent conductivity of their fur, they condense the power of lightning to extend their wings, dashing to dispel the haze and brighten their mood.

skills.name: Thunder Field
skills.description: Generates a thunder field that keeps following the target. Targets within the thunder field that receive a Lightning attack will be hit by an additional Lightning attack and be inflicted with a Lightning Debuff . The thunder field lasts for 8 s.

upgrade.name: Thunder Field
upgrade.description: Release a Thunder Field centered on the target that continuously follows it. While the target is inside the Thunder Field, getting hit by a Lightning ATK will trigger an additional Lightning ATK and inflict Lightning Debuff on the target. The Thunder Field lasts 8 seconds. Lightning ATK triggered by the Thunder Field grants 2 stacks of Sky Thunder Contract .

skills.name: Lightning Dart
skills.description: Launches a lightning dart at the target, dealing damage to all targets along the way while drawing them closer.

skills.name: Thunder Imprint
skills.description: Gains [Thunder Imprint] . While active, each hit against a target stores damage on the target, then deals all stored damage when the effect ends. Lasts 8 s. If the target has 10 stacks of Lightning Debuff, consumes them to deal 100% extra damage.

skills.name: Radiant Dart
skills.description: Launches a lightning dart at the target, dealing damage to all targets along the way while drawing them closer.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields the power of lightning to attack targets from a distance.

ultimates.name: Thunderfeather Volley
ultimates.description: Transforms the lightning wrapped around both wings into 5 arrows and fires them at the target. If in Thunder Wing Stance, fires an additional 5 arrows, and at the end, deals additional explosion damage with 20 Might.

traits.name: Thunderbond
traits.description: When this Aniimo's attack hits a target, it gains 1 stack of [Thunderbond]. At 30 stacks, it enters the [Thunderwing Stance] when using its next skill or Ultimate. Lasts 10s.

skills.description: Extends its arm and throws its sword at targets ahead. When the sword returns, it pulls normal targets in front of itself.

traits.description: Deals 30% extra damage to targets affected by control effects or BREAK.

upgrade.description: Deals damage to targets within 1.5 x range and applies [Coral Mark] for s. When [Coral Mark] ends, each marked target takes additional damage equal to 3 Might for each instance of Earth damage taken while the mark was active, and the user restores EP.

skills.name: Coral Trap
skills.description: Creates a coral trap ahead for 5 s. It deals damage to targets every second and applies 1 stack of Earth Debuff.

skills.name: Quicksand Slam
skills.description: Creates quicksand ahead, dealing damage to targets and applying [Imprisonment] for 2s.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields the power of earth to attack targets at close range.

ultimates.name: Coral Prison
ultimates.description: Deals wide-area damage to targets in front and restores 30 EP. Hit targets enter [Imprisonment] for 2s. When [Imprisonment] ends, the target takes additional damage equal to 25% of the original skill's Might.

traits.name: Overcharged Coral

entries.name: Cheekie
entries.description: People often mistake the circles on their cheeks for eyes. They love to gather in groups on the shore, feeling safe only when they huddle closely with their companions.

skills.description: Leaps toward the target and slams down, dealing circular AoE damage. When enhanced, gains an Ice Shield equal to 10% of max HP and creates a ring-shaped Ice Prison around the target for 8s. Recast to cancel the Ice Prison.

skills.name: Sand Rush
skills.description: Charges in the selected direction, knocking back targets and dealing damage. Hitting any target consumes 10% of current HP.

entries.name: Wavwal
entries.description: They move clumsily on land using their four limbs, but they are experts at sliding on their bellies. The males are highly territorial against other males, once angered, they unleash their wrath like a tsunami.

entries.name: Bubbeep
entries.description: It stretches its leafy feathers with lazy ease, always chewing away as it turns algae and slime into floating bubbles. One light hop, and off it drifts, riding the bubbles like a little boat in the breeze.

skills.name: Baa-Baa Healbubb
skills.description: While floating and moving, heals all allies within range for 12% of the caster’s Max HP over 6 s.

skills.name: Baa-Baa Sweetbubb
skills.description: Fires a bubble beam that pierces through allies and enemies, dealing damage to enemies and applying a shield to allies along its path. The shield equals 7.0% of the caster’s Max HP and lasts 10s.

entries.name: Popapus
entries.description: It loves collecting colorful bubbles. They bob and sway inside its air sac as it moves, and when inspiration strikes, it uses them to doodle strange little wonders in the air.

skills.name: Rigged Odds
skills.description: Consumes the least common bubble color. The next basic attack is guaranteed to fire the most common color, and basic attack damage increases by 25% for 15s.

skills.name: Clearance Sale
skills.description: Continuously spits bubbles at the target for 5 s. The user can move while casting, but movement speed is reduced. This skill's damage counts as basic attack damage.

skills.name: ATK
skills.description: Wields the power of water to attack targets from a distance.

traits.name: Gachapon
traits.description: Each basic attack and skill triggers the gacha once, randomly firing an orange, purple, blue, or gold bubble and adding that bubble color to the gacha slots. Gold bubbles have a 1% chance to appear, while each other color has a 33% chance to appear. When the slots hold 5 bubbles of the same color, or when a gold bubble appears, all bubbles are cleared and [Jackpot] begins for 10s. In [Jackpot], basic attacks and skills no longer trigger the gacha and always fire Rainbow Bubbles. Basic attack damage +60%.

entries.name: Malevsera
entries.description: They hide their fangs and claws in their soft body. Expert at using their gentle, harmless look to lower other creatures' guard before casually freezing them into ice sculptures.

skills.name: Demonic State
skills.description: This Aniimo enters [Demonic State], continuously consuming energy. Press the Skill button again to end the state. When the state ends, deals damage around this Aniimo and restores HP equal to 30% of the damage dealt during this state, up to 50% of max HP. [Demonic State] increases skill damage by 30% and changes skill cost to 10% of current HP. After 6 skill casts, holding basic attack deals additional damage equal to 50 Might.

upgrade.name: Demonic State
upgrade.description: Activates Demonic State , continuously draining Energy. Press the skill again to end the state, dealing damage once to surrounding targets and restoring HP equal to 30% of the damage dealt while transformed. HP restored cannot exceed 50% Max HP. Demonic State increases Skill damage by % . Skill costs are replaced with % of current HP. After casting skills 6 times, hold Basic Attack to deal extra damage equal to 50 Might.
